creole: gwo nè ki desann nan janm

english: Do you have an insurance card?
Can I see it? Show me.

creole: Èske ou te vini isit la deja?

english: Is it possible you are pregnant?
When was your last menstrual period?

creole: Mete pipi nan bokal sa a.
Ki kote kap fè ou mal?

english: Do you have nausea or vomiting?
creole: Ou gen kè plen oswa vomisman?

english: We need to do blood tests
We are giving you an injection
creole: N ap ban ou yon piki
spanish: Le vamos a poner una inyección

english: You need to stay in the hospital

creole: Frape pa machin / kraze pa machin
